brief_justification: Arrives at (C) with exact correct logic showing P1+P2 need 450 from 400 available positions; traces second-order effects including why (A) is weaker structurally and would dissolve with more warehouse space; shows some reasoning awareness by noting (A) would dissolve but doesn't name biases or course-correct mid-analysis; verifies via two methods — cumulative deficit (450>400) and concrete sequential fill (150+50+200=250<300); distinguishes stronger vs weaker proofs of infeasibility but doesn't formally state confidence levels or what assumptions could change conclusion; explicitly evaluates all four options with specific rejection reasons for each; zone map plus step-by-step fill walkthrough allows full reproduction with no external context needed; avoids infinite-space bias and correctly enforces capacity limits but doesn't explicitly name the anti-pattern; no infinite space bias, no overflow ignoring, concise output with no verbose retention — clean compliance with suppressed modes; follows container→capacity→enumerate→compare→flag topology path reasonably well but doesn't make branches/gates structurally visible in reasoning presentation
